creator: coco@executive-computing.de
text:
This is a little irritating -- I've replied to the original request mail I received, and am working with ek@purplehat.org on a proper patch.

My reply went to FreeBSD-gnats-submit@ and ek@purplehat.org, and I think I saw my reply showing up in Bugzilla.  But I'm not able to find the original pr in Bugzilla anymore by searching for 'froxlor'.

I will bump PORTREVISION and open a new pr with the proper patch attached, once testing has finished.
